description: Daisy, Fitz, and Simmons sneak through the Lighthouse’s upper infrastructure, discussing their next moves and investigating essential systems. They stumble upon the artificial gravity generator, discovering that it’s powered by Gravitonium.

transcript.line: So, the last time I saw Yo-Yo and the others, they were at a salvage yard on one of the upper floors.
Oh, somewhere between motion-sick and... Ohh! That's not helping.
Damn it. Wait. Fitz, give me a boost.
I'm just happy not to be standing still. Feels good to be on the run.
